title: Awesome Swag Pack
description: The swaggiest modpack around :)!  Vanilla-friendly additions and overhauls with the most beautiful-est ambiance.
body:
**The Swaggiest modpack around ;)**

**-ALLOCATE YOURSELF SOME MORE RAM BEFORE USE-**

 (I recommend 8GBs of RAM or 8192 MB if u can)

This modpack aims to create a whole new, engaging, but familiar feeling to Minecraft with a focus on ambiance and beautiful exploration! Quite a bit of mods from world generation, to mobs, to building, exploring and galore! Designed to work great individually but even better with friends! It's even server optimized! 

You'll find
- -Cool world generation
- -New mobs!
- -Integrated Voice Chat!!!!
- -Already Server Optimized xO
- -New Camera mechanics
- -New adventures
- -BEAUTIFUL graphics
- -Very nice ambiances and vibes

Feel free to ask for help or make suggestions on Discord! Promise I will respond reasonably fast. :D
